word: H7824 - שָׁחִיף - shâchîyph - shaw-kheef' - Cieled with

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחיף

Transliteration: shâchı̂yph

Phonetic: shaw-kheef'

BDB Definition:

  1. panelled or wainscotted with wood (adjective)
    1. meaning doubtful
  2. a wainscot of wood (noun)
    1. meaning doubtful

Origin: from the same as H7828

TWOT entry: 2249

Part(s) of speech:
